tool_args.label: Bay Parkway and Cropsey Avenue Bus Priority and Safety Improvements

payload.project_name: Bay Parkway and Cropsey Avenue Bus Priority and Safety Improvements
payload.description: Draft proposal for offset bus lanes, curbside bus lanes, left turn bays, and safety improvements on Bay Parkway from Avenue J to Shore Parkway and Cropsey Avenue from Bay Parkway to 26th Avenue

evidence_refs.source_quote: Bay Parkway and Cropsey Avenue Bus Priority and Safety Improvements Draft Proposal

payload.location_text: Bay Parkway between Avenue J and Cropsey Avenue
payload.description: Offset bus lanes between Avenue J and Cropsey Avenue. Repurpose one of two general travel lanes for offset bus lane. Left travel lane and curbside parking lane maintained. Bus lanes shift to curbside at some intersections to accommodate left turn lanes.

normalized_location.raw_text: Bay Parkway between Avenue J and Cropsey Avenue

evidence_refs.source_quote: Bay Parkway: Offset bus lanes between Avenue J and Cropsey Avenue
Repurpose one of two general travel lanes for offset bus lane along Bay Parkway

payload.location_text: Cropsey Avenue between Bay Parkway and 26th Avenue
payload.description: Offset bus lanes between Bay Parkway and 26th Avenue. Repurpose right travel lane. Left travel lane and curbside parking lane maintained. Customized design block-by-block.

normalized_location.raw_text: Cropsey Avenue between Bay Parkway and 26th Avenue

evidence_refs.source_quote: Cropsey Avenue: Offset bus lanes between Bay Parkway and 26 th Avenue
Repurpose right travel lane (between left travel lane and curbside parking lane) along Bay Parkway and Cropsey Avenue corridors

tool_args.label: Bay Parkway Curbside Bus Lane and Left Turn Bay

payload.treatment_kind: curbside bus lane with left turn bay
payload.location_text: Bay Parkway at select intersections about every 4 to 5 blocks
payload.description: Offset bus lanes shift to curb on one side approaching select intersections (about every 4 to 5 blocks) to accommodate left turn lanes at intersections with high volumes of left turns. Separate left turn queue reduces weaving of through traffic.

normalized_location.raw_text: Bay Parkway at select intersections about every 4 to 5 blocks

evidence_refs.source_quote: Offset bus lanes shift to the curb on one side of street approaching select Bay Parkway intersections (about every 4 to 5 blocks)
